summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all main requirements (classification, reports, formats, exit codes, workflow execution). Unit tests thoroughly exercise core logic and config parsing. CLI tests verify happy paths and a few error cases. Workflow tests validate YAML structure and execute 3 act scenarios. Gaps: missing CLI error validation tests (invalid --reference-date format, negative --warning-days, missing --config, non-existent file), no explicit boundary tests at warningDays threshold (though implicitly covered), limited to 3 act test cases. Strong organization with good fixtures, helpers, isolation, and cleanup. Would catch most regressions in core logic; CLI edge cases less protected.
